category: 商业生产级信息图-融合技法
source: G6 Track C 演化结晶 - 学会写作2.0六大融合技法全运用

color_palette.description: 五色分区编码: 蓝#31ACF4(系统) 橙#FA9960(选题) 紫#A088FF(标题) 绿#2EA86B(素材) 红#E04F5F(传播)

typography.description: HarmonyOS Sans(主) + OPPOSans(辅), 6级字号层次, 三层密度分层(核心24pt+/次级14pt/细节10pt)

layout.card_style: rounded rectangle, border-radius 8px, 多布局共存
layout.spacing: generous whitespace between regions, cross-region connector lines
layout.badges: semantic icons on key nodes (book=input, brain=think, pen=output)
layout.description: 六布局共存: 顶部线性流程主轴+左上放射导图+中部树状层级+右侧矩阵网格+底部环形闭环+跨模块连接线

visual_frequency.HF: 核心观点大字(24pt+) + 主色强调 + 语义图标 (前1/3画面)
visual_frequency.MF: 次级要点中字(14pt) + 功能色分区 (中段叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 细节说明小字(10pt) + 浅色背景 (底部收束)
visual_frequency.progression: 多布局分区呈现, 跨模块连接线形成知识网络, 闭环循环表达迭代过程

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 内容创作者·知识工作者·需要系统性方法论全景
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 复杂知识体系全景可视化, 需读者有内容创作基础, 多布局融合需深度研读

reader_constraint.reader_state: 系统学习者·渴望掌握完整方法论体系
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 研读模式(深度学习+笔记+跨模块关联)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 6大模块完整体系 + 多布局融合 + 跨模块逻辑关联 + 闭环迭代表达

prompt_keywords: multi-layout fusion knowledge map, linear flow axis, radial mind map, tree hierarchy, matrix grid, circular loop, color-zoned regions, semantic icons, 3-layer font hierarchy, cross-region connectors, balanced composition, professional infographic
negative_keywords: single layout, chaotic, cluttered, overlapping, unreadable, 3D render, photorealistic, dark background, handwritten
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 学会写作2.0全融合图谱
✅ 必须: 六布局共存(线性+放射+树状+矩阵+网状+环形) + 五色分区编码 + 语义图标 + 三层密度分层 + 跨模块连接线 + 闭环循环表达
❌ 禁止: 单一布局 + 混乱堆砌 + 信息过载 + 3D渲染 + 写实照片
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Multi-layout fusion map ONLY. Six layouts coexist (linear+radial+tree+matrix+network+circular). Five-color zone coding (blue/orange/purple/green/red). Semantic icons on nodes. 3-layer font hierarchy. Cross-region connectors. NO single layout, NO chaotic stacking.
meta_prompt: multi-layout fusion knowledge map, linear flow axis top, radial mind map left, tree hierarchy center, matrix grid right, circular loop bottom, color-zoned regions blue orange purple green red, semantic icons, 3-layer font hierarchy 24pt 14pt 10pt, cross-region connectors, balanced composition, professional infographic, HarmonyOS Sans typography
prompt_example: Full fusion knowledge map, top linear flow axis (input→think→output), left radial mind map (system thinking 6 branches), center tree hierarchy (topic 8 techniques), right matrix grid (title 8 techniques comparison), bottom circular loop (START→ENDLESS), color-zoned regions blue #31ACF4 orange #FA9960 purple #A088FF green #2EA86B red #E04F5F, semantic icons on nodes, 3-layer font hierarchy (core 24pt bold, secondary 14pt, detail 10pt), cross-region connector lines, balanced composition, HarmonyOS Sans typography, professional infographic. --ar 3:4 --s 300 --style raw --fusion full
reference_source: G6 Track C演化结晶 - 学会写作2.0六大融合技法(多布局共存/色彩分区/图标语义/密度分层/连接线/闭环表达)
